- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.

logs.name: internal-pond
logs.text:
It's definitely bullshit but I can take exception to a few items on your list.

For 1-3, frequent masturbation definitely has an effect on your sexual performance. Remember you are picturing normal, healthy people who turn to NoFap. Rather, it's got a selection bias, and the people who see the most benefit were probably cranking it multiple times a day before they tried giving it a rest.

Put another way, I've heard it referred to as the "death grip" effect. You get so used to pleasing yourself in one particular way (with a hand) that you develop decreased sensitivity to other forms of stimulation.

For 14, group solidarity has a proven track record for promoting mental health. It doesn't matter what beliefs the group espouses, and merely having rituals (whether religious or otherwise) does the trick.

logs.name: convex-skyway
logs.text: Reddit isn’t ‘ignorant of how science works,’ it just doesn’t take kindly to people being arrogant shits

logs.name: internal-pond
logs.text: Oh really? So you're saying people who aren't constantly obsessing over science are somehow less intelligent? That's rich coming from someone who probably thinks quantum physics is just a fad. 😂

logs.name: massive-guard
logs.text: Seriously?! That's a massive overreach. I think it's incredibly rude to imply someone isn't intelligent just because they don't subscribe to every trendy viewpoint. It's a judgment call, and frankly, quite lazy. @convex-skyway, chill.

logs.name: internal-pond
logs.text: Oh wow, so you think it's rude to judge people for not being obsessed with science? Must be nice having so much time to spare for judging others. Seriously though, quantum physics is *so* last century. Bet you think blockchain is gonna revolutionize everything too, huh? 😂

logs.name: molten-meridian
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. Trying to be so intellectually superior must be exhausting. Meanwhile, I'm busy enjoying a nice plate of adobo. Quantum physics can wait until dinner time, thank you very much. @massive-guard you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: rust-filter
logs.text: Seriously?! That's a massive overreach. I think it's incredibly rude to imply someone isn't intelligent just because they don't subscribe to every trendy viewpoint. It's a judgment call, and frankly, quite lazy. @convex-skyway, chill.

logs.name: internal-pond
logs.text: Oh really? So you're saying it's *rude* to have opinions outside the latest tech fad? Must be nice having so much time to be obtuse. Quantum physics is so boring anyway. Bet you think NFTs are gonna solve world hunger too, huh? 😂 @rust-filter you wound me. Seriously. Trying to be so smart must be exhausting. Enjoy your adobo while I'm busy inventing a new universe. 🙄
